message:
fix(authpool): Fix race condition in ForceRefresh by atomic status check

Move profile existence check and status validation to AFTER semaphore
acquisition to prevent race conditions in ForceRefresh.

Previous behavior (racy):
1. Check if profile exists and isn't already refreshing
2. Wait for semaphore slot
3. Start refresh
Problem: Another goroutine could start refreshing between steps 1 and 3

Fixed behavior (atomic):
1. Acquire semaphore slot first (blocking)
2. Use TryMarkRefreshing() which atomically checks existence AND current
   status, only marking as refreshing if profile exists and isn't already
   in that state
3. If TryMarkRefreshing returns false, check why (not found vs already
   refreshing) and return appropriate error

This ensures the "check and mark" operation is atomic relative to other
ForceRefresh callers, preventing duplicate concurrent refresh operations
on the same profile.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
